summary: Apple Q2 FY2026 earnings beat: revenue $111.2B, EPS $2.01 vs $1.94 estimate. Gross margin 49.3% (record). iPhone 17 supply constraints. $100B buyback authorized. Dividend raised to $0.27/share. Tim Cook CEO transition to John Ternus on Sept 1, 2026. Q3 guidance: revenue +14% to +17% YoY. Stock +5% on earnings.
